_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Nf1+/− P2 nerve cells generated primary spheres, but wild type cells did not; at P120 cells from neither genotype yielded spheres...P2 Nf1+/− spheres, in contrast, failed to give rise to secondary spheres
details: P2 Nf1+/− nerve cells generated primary spheres but failed to give rise to secondary spheres, while wild type cells did not form primary spheres
